itemListElement.reviewBody:
I recently came to know about the current ssvm principal from an old school where he worked and felt compelled to share my concerns. While I understand that every principal brings unique strengths to their role, I was surprised to discover that he lacks formal academic experience. Previously working primarily as a music teacher and as a principal in a smaller school, it raises questions about his ability to effectively oversee the academic aspects of a larger institution.

I spoke with an SSVM  teacher who mentioned that the principal does not engage with the academic curriculum, which is concerning for me. I believe it is crucial for a principal to have a solid academic foundation and to be involved in the educational direction of the school. I hope the management considers these factors, as the success of our children’s education depends on strong guidance.

itemReviewed.name: SSVM School of Excellence - Trichy Rd
SSVM School of Excellence - Trichy Rd

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is for the entire team of SSVM School of Excellence
I really want to take this opportunity to thank every single member of this school starting from the principal,the teachers the office staff the student counsellor Jisha ma'am the non office helping staff,the transport coordinators and the transport staff every single member working in that school.
Truly from the bottom of my heart .. THANK YOU for being who you are and I wish hope and pray to  God that your entire team.always stays this way ..I would never wish for even one of those teachers to leave that school
Thank you for making my daughter the person she is today..I have seen her growth every single day,the way she has opened up,the way she has become more confident ready to express herself..I know for one how closed up she was when she was studying in her previous  school.
Imagine my child who I literally had to drag to send her to school ,now cries.if she misses school for a day.. She enjoys every single minute of her time spent there and the full credit goes to the teachers and the environment they create..imagine the child saying ..I had so much fun studying today!!! That is what every parent would want to hear all the time and SSVM School of Excellencedoea it every day..
The school truly has stood up to their name EXCELLENCE ...in every sense..
It's very unfortunate that my daughter has to move from this town or else we would never move out of this school ever. No exaggeration I kept searching for schools in the country iam currently but was not satisfied with anything..the. I realised it's because I'm looking for another SSVM . Which I don't think I'll find..
I really have a request to the school management to please consider opening schools worldwide☺️ And if you do trust me I will.be the first to enrol my daughter there.I don't know if I'll miss the teachers more or my daughter will. I'm so proud of making the right decision for my daughter to put her in SSVm school of excellence
Thank you very much Team SSVM ☺️

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Best school in Coimbatore. Neat and clean atmosphere and the Infrastructure is really superb!!!. My daughter studying in this school for the past two years. The coaching is extraordinary.. the way they care the children  is  very good and it's a very safe school.. my daughter enjoying her schooling.. and she is happy and proud to be a student in SSVM Institutions....
Thanks and regards
Priya
